articles.title: New Hampshire and North Dakota Push for Bitcoin Reserves in State Funds
articles.description: New Hampshire and North Dakota propose tech-neutral bills to establish Bitcoin reserves, aligning with a growing trend in U.S. state treasuries.

articles.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson praises XRP for strong community, leadership, and purpose
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson cheered XRP, crediting its leadership and dedicated community for having a defined purpose.

articles.title: XRP ‘just days’ away from all-time high breakout, according to analyst
articles.description: As XRP’s price attempts a short-term recovery, the token’s technical setup suggests a breakout to a new all-time high backed … Continue reading The post XRP ‘just days’ away from all-time high breakout, according to analyst appeared first on Finbold.
